global_description: A small, sleek bird with a streamlined body and long, pointed wings. It features a glossy blue-black upper body and a contrasting reddish-brown throat and forehead. The underparts are pale with a buff hue, and the tail is deeply forked, enhancing its agile flight.

part_details.upper_body: Glossy blue-black, smooth and sleek, covering the back and wings.
part_details.throat: Reddish-brown, distinct against the darker upper body.
part_details.underparts: Pale buff, smooth texture, covering the belly and chest.
part_details.tail: Deeply forked, long and narrow, enhancing aerodynamic shape.
part_details.wings: Long, pointed, and slender, aiding in swift flight.

spatial_relations: The reddish-brown throat is positioned below the blue-black head.
The deeply forked tail extends from the rear of the body.
The long wings are attached to the sides of the streamlined body.
